allowed: Aurion turns goals into governed missions.
The demo uses the real Command Center UI.
The screenshots use deterministic fixtures derived from a genuine demo Mission Receipt.
The bounded public spine demo passes its focused tests.

Aurion is proven safe for unattended operation.

public_narrative: Aurion is a local-first, permission-governed AI mission system that turns user goals into governed missions and records what happened through receipts, evidence, and audit trails. This controlled Demo Public Alpha shows one governed spine: Goal -> Mission Plan -> Permission Check -> AuditLedger -> Mission Receipt -> Command Center. It is not production-ready and not full public alpha; agents should leave receipts.
validation: pytest focused honesty suite (public spine demo + install + screenshot + readme positioning) -> pass
git_tracking_note: New brief-named publish docs + updated test are untracked/modified; README.md is tracked. Explicit-pathspec staging command is in the markdown artifact and handoff. NOT executed (no add -A, no commit, no push, no release).
